metadata.title: YouTube Title Generator: Choose a Title Worth Testing Before You Publish
metadata.description: Generate YouTube title angles from your summary or transcript, compare shortlisted options, and choose a stronger title before publishing.
metadata.keywords: youtube title generator, youtube video title generator, ai youtube title tool, youtube title optimizer, youtube title ideas, click through rate titles, youtube ctr tool

ui.title: YouTube Title Generator
ui.subtitle: Generate grouped title angles from your summary or transcript, compare shortlisted options, and pick the strongest title before you publish.
ui.topic_placeholder: e.g. how I edit long-form YouTube videos faster
ui.audience_placeholder: e.g. solo creators editing their own videos
ui.summary_placeholder: One or two sentences on what viewers will learn or feel
ui.transcript_placeholder: Paste a transcript or key points to anchor titles in real content
ui.empty_output: Describe your video and audience, then generate to see grouped title angles here.

validation.audience_required: Tell us who the video is for.
validation.summary_required: Add a short summary so the title ideas stay relevant.

feature1.name: feature_intro
feature1.label: Overview
feature1.title: What This YouTube Title Generator Is Good At
feature1.description: Built for creators who already publish and want to choose a stronger title before each upload. Instead of a flat list, you get grouped angles, diagnostics on every option, and a shortlist flow that helps you decide.

items.title: Four distinct title angles
items.description: Search-first, curiosity-first, outcome-first, and contrarian-first groups let you compare strategic directions instead of slight variations.

items.title: Diagnostics on every candidate
items.description: Character count, truncation risk, keyword placement, and authenticity risk help you read why a title will or will not earn the click.

items.title: Shortlist, compare, recommend
items.description: Save up to three titles, compare side by side, and lean on a balanced recommendation plus a backup angle.

how_to_use.name: how_to_use
how_to_use.label: HOW TO USE
how_to_use.title: How to Use the YouTube Title Generator in 3 Steps
how_to_use.description: From summary to a title worth testing in under a minute.

items.title: Describe your video brief
items.description: Tell the YouTube Title Generator what the video is about, who it is for, and add a short summary. Use advanced options to add a transcript or avoid words.

items.title: Review grouped title angles
items.description: Browse the four angle groups, read diagnostics on each card, and save the strongest two or three to your shortlist.

items.title: Pick and copy
items.description: Compare your shortlisted titles side by side, then copy the recommended final title or your favorite backup option.

feature2.name: feature_benefits
feature2.label: Benefits
feature2.title: Why Creators Use the YouTube Title Generator
feature2.description: Decide on a title with confidence instead of staring at the upload screen.

items.title: Decide, do not just brainstorm
items.description: Diagnostics and a recommended title push you toward a confident pick instead of an endless scroll.

items.title: Catch truncation before upload
items.description: Character count and truncation risk warn you when a long title will be cut off in browse results.

items.title: Local history for retries
items.description: Recent generations stay on your device so you can re-run a winning brief without retyping it.

feature3.name: use_cases
feature3.label: Use Cases
feature3.title: Best Uses for the YouTube Title Generator
feature3.description: For actively publishing creators who want a stronger title before each upload.

items.title: Picking between two angles
items.description: Compare search-first and curiosity-first titles side by side and pick the angle that fits the video's goal.

items.title: Avoiding clickbait
items.description: Authenticity risk flags exaggerated patterns so you can keep curiosity without losing trust.

items.title: Tightening long titles
items.description: Truncation diagnostics catch titles that get cut off in browse and mobile results before you publish.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: YouTube Title Generator FAQ
faq.description: Short answers about scope, privacy, and usage.

items.title: Is this YouTube Title Generator free?
items.description: Yes. You can generate titles, save a shortlist, copy results, and revisit recent generations without signing up.

items.title: How many titles does the YouTube Title Generator produce per run?
items.description: Each run produces twelve titles spread across four angle groups (search-first, curiosity-first, outcome-first, contrarian-first), plus a recommended title and a backup option.

items.title: What do the diagnostics on each title mean?
items.description: Character count, truncation risk, keyword placement, and authenticity risk are heuristics to help you compare titles. They are decision support, not objective truth.

items.title: Does the YouTube Title Generator check live search ranking?
items.description: No. It produces structured title options with diagnostics and a recommendation. It does not predict search rank or CTR.

items.title: Can I use the YouTube Title Generator for non-English videos?
items.description: Yes. Pick a locale in the URL and the rationale, diagnostics, and recommendations will be written in that language.

items.title: Can I save titles and come back later?
items.description: Yes. Save up to three titles to a shortlist and revisit recent generations from local history stored on your device.

items.title: Will the YouTube Title Generator work for niche topics?
items.description: Yes. Add a transcript and as specific a summary as you can. The more concrete the brief, the stronger the candidates.

items.title: Can I regenerate titles if I don't like the first batch?
items.description: Yes. Hit Regenerate to produce a fresh batch using the same brief, or tweak the length and optimization preferences and run again.
